title: M4: Bucket-aware edge intercept features
description: Replace TurnBatch edge geometry with bucket-aware intercept features at two anchor fleet speeds (s=1.0, s=6.0). Schema v3→v4. Dynamic shield unchanged. Win gate: episode_reward_mean ≥2% lift at 3 seeds × 500 updates.

stories.title: Phase 1: Catalog + schema bump
stories.description: Catalog redesign, schema bump v3→v4, TaskConfig.intercept_anchors, checkpoint compat parser/floor/inferrer.
stories.verification_evidence: EDGE_FEATURE_CATALOG.base_dim==18; checkpoint compat schema v4 parser/floor/inferrer; test-domain-artifacts 36/36

stories.title: Phase 2: Encoder integration + goldens
stories.description: Add orbital primitive, rewrite _edge_features, update policy encoder default dim, add golden tests.
acceptance_criteria: _edge_features rewritten with per-anchor intercept geometry and crosses_now
4 new golden tests in test_feature_encoding_golden.py pass
TODO comment at lexsort site present

stories.title: Phase 3: Docs + fixture sweep
stories.description: Update feature-encoding docs, fixture sweep, spike script constant.
acceptance_criteria: grep finds no stale E=12 or schema_version=3 in docs/tests/scripts/src
tests/test_kaggle_submission_packager.py fixtures updated to schema 4 / E=18
stories.verification_evidence: docs and fixtures updated (E=18, schema v4); Makefile includes test_intercept_edge_features.py

stories.title: Phase 4: Ablation + reward gate
stories.description: Variance smoke, paired A/B training, throughput benchmark, gate evaluation report. Deferred until M2 transformer work finalized.
acceptance_criteria: Paired A/B ablation runbook executed or documented with user approval
H1 submission validator zero rejections, H2 throughput ±5%, W1 reward gate documented
stories.notes: Deferred by user: run ablation after finalizing planet self-attention (M2) encoder work
